title: selaginella calceolata
intro: Selaginella calceolata, also known as the "Monkey's Face," is a species of evergreen flowering plant in the genus Selaginella, characterized by its unique, heart-shaped leaves and reddish-brown stems. Traditionally, Selaginella calceolata has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties and ability to reduce inflammation. The plant is also believed to possess various health benefits, including its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Selaginella calceolata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
